name: repost-with-agent
description: Skill-only agent/OpenClaw-compatible plugin for agent-driven, browser-based reposting across LinkedIn, X, Bluesky, Threads, and Facebook. No CLI, no MCP server, no Playwright, no platform SDKs — just skills + commands + JSON state. OpenClaw is a first-class harness path; the current agent uses its own browser automation and Telegram/message tools.
